views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's affirmation count, current streak, mood lift gauge, favorite affirmation spotlight, and quick-add floating button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal: write or pick an affirmation, select category, rate mood before/after, set repetitions, optionally write a reflection

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped list of past affirmations with category filter chips, favorite filter, and mood-lift badges on each entry

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Charts for mood lift trend over time, category distribution pie chart, practice time heatmap, streak history, and AI-generated insights on which categories and times yield highest resonance

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayAverageMoodLift
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average (moodAfter - moodBefore) for today's entries, measures immediate emotional impact

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one affirmation entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyPracticeCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total affirmation entries in the current week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyMoodLiftTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: This week's average mood lift minus last week's average; positive means improving effectiveness

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageResonance
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Rolling 30-day average resonance score across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most frequently used category in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entry count per category for pie chart visualization

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodLiftByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood lift grouped by category to identify which themes are most effective

viewModelComputedProperties.name: practiceTimeDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entry count per practice time slot for heatmap display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: favoriteAffirmations
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries marked as favorite, sorted by resonance descending for spotlight rotation

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood lift for the past 7 days, used for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood lift for the past 30 days for long-term trend analysis

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily goal completed (todayAffirmationCount / dailyGoal), capped at 1.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: best performing category, optimal practice time, streak encouragement, mood lift milestones

dailyGoal.description: Target number of affirmations to practice per day

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if the user logs at least 1 affirmation entry on that calendar day. Streak breaks if any calendar day (excluding future dates) has zero entries.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare this week's average mood lift (moodAfter - moodBefore) against previous week. Track 30-day rolling resonance average. Identify which AffirmationCategory yields the highest average mood lift and surface it as the user's 'power category'. Track practice time patterns to recommend optimal time of day.
insights: Power Category: 'Your [category] affirmations lift your mood by [X] points on average — lean into this theme.'
Optimal Timing: 'You feel the strongest shift when practicing in the [morning/evening] — consider making it a ritual.'
Streak Motivation: 'You're on a [N]-day streak! Your longest is [M] days — keep going!'
Mood Lift Milestone: 'Your average mood lift this month is [X] — that's [up/down] from last month.'
Resonance Trend: 'Your resonance scores are trending [up/down] — try refreshing your affirmations if they feel stale.'
Favorite Spotlight: 'Your most resonant affirmation is: "[text]" — revisit it when you need a boost.'
Consistency Insight: 'You've practiced [N] times this week vs [M] last week — [encouragement or praise].'
Category Diversity: 'You've explored [N] of 8 categories this month — trying new themes can deepen your practice.'
